meta.title: Double R Handyman Service — Hyde Park & Chicago Handyman
meta.description: Reliable, efficient handyman services in Hyde Park and nearby Chicago neighborhoods. Repairs, installations, plumbing, electrical, painting, and more.

hero.headline: Your trusted handyman team.
hero.subheadline: Reliable, efficient, and high-quality solutions for your home or business maintenance needs.

about.heading: About Us
about.para1: Double R Handyman Service is the two-person team of Luigi Ramos and Jesus Robain. "Double R" represents the shared last name initial of our two-person team, committed to delivering dependable and professional service.
about.para2: We take pride in every job — big or small. Our approach is simple: show up on time, communicate clearly, and deliver quality work that lasts. We treat your home like our own.

props.title: Two-person team, one point of contact.
props.description: You're never juggling a big crew.

props.title: Quality that lasts.
props.description: We do the job right the first time.
